PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La for petitioner.

Mrs. La stated that she has not heard of any objections, spoke of how in certain cultures people have several names and use them in different order, and presented a declaration from Alberto saying that he received notice and that he does not object. Mrs. Tran is to file said declaration. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 17, 2002 is admitted to probate. Sonia Eugenia Gonzalez aka Sonia Villalta is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 10, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
